## What & why

## How I verified it

<!-- Not just "tests pass" — how did you exercise the change in the running app? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes (type-checks + compiles)
- [ ] Verified the change in the running app (`bun dev`), not only in theory
- [ ] Updated docs (README / DEPLOY / .env.example) if behavior or config changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or real vault content committed
